title: The Spoken Word Is The Original Seed
paragraphs: Good morning, friends. It's a privilege to be here this morning. I was a little late in getting here. I...?... just been so nervous and upset. And now, but I'm very happy to be here, to be among you all.

And now, I know you're expecting a message, and I'm going to do my best, by the grace of God, to bring you one. Now, this morning's message is going to be... I--I want you to take your Bibles and turn with me to Saint Luke, the 8th chapter, and we'll begin with the 4th verse.

title: Christ Is The Mystery Of God Revealed
paragraphs: Thank you, Brother Neville. The Lord bless you. Good morning, friends. It's a privilege to be here this morning, in the service of the living God.

And we have just gone through a great time in the Lord, and I'm grateful for this. And I know you are, too. To see the handiwork of the Lord, to see His power, to see His grace, to hear His message come forth in that manner.
